mapper.insert: INSERT INTO members (username, password, nickname, role, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ( #{username}, #{password}, #{nickname}, #{role, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.EnumTypeHandler}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE members SET nickname = #{nickname}, role = #{role, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.EnumTypeHandler}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE members SET password = #{encodedPassword}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{memberId}
